titleEn: Grower to Grower Podcast: “See the Good”: Jessie Jacobson on Building a Positive Company Culture
contentHtml:
The owner of Tonkadale Greenhouse in Minnesota has expanded her passion for plants into a passion for building a healthy team and cultivating a positive work environment.
The post Grower to Grower Podcast: “See the Good”: Jessie Jacobson on Building a Positive Company Culture appeared first on Greenhouse Grower.
